Bob Marley: One Love (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $96,981,216Details
International Box Office $79,779,143
Worldwide Box Office $176,760,359
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $287,020
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $392,273
Total $679,293
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The life and music of an icon who inspired generations through his message of love and unity.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,659,004 (29.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,539 opening theaters/3,597 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $102,554,847

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2024 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures

Running Time: 104 minutes
Filming location (city or town): London, England

Production Countries: United States
